About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data shows LINC at rank #1 with an exceptional 95.5 overall score, driven by extraordinary long-term momentum: 1,446.92% over 10 years, 506.64% over 5 years, and 151.38% over 1 year, all while significantly outperforming SPY across all three timeframes (139.65%, 443.97%, and 1,237.36% respectively). The stock passes all four ratio tests with accelerating growth patterns (particularly the 3m/1m ratio of 5.64) and confirms above all major moving averages, generating a "strong_buy" signal with clean momentum and confirmed volatility expansion at 1.518x. In contrast, CLMT at rank #2 shows a critical structural weakness: while it matches LINC's near-term performance through 5 years (564.30% vs 506.64%), its 10-year return collapses to 161.17% and turns deeply negative versus SPY (-48.39%) and QQQ (-258.45%), suggesting a company that either recently transformed or faced severe long-term headwinds before recent recovery. Both stocks pass all moving average filters and beat SPY substantially over 1-5 years, but LINC's consistent
